x_lkg_required_connectors.name: web_search
x_lkg_required_connectors.purpose: Find public market signals, company updates, competitor promotions, retail news, and macro demand indicators.

x_lkg_required_connectors.name: browser
x_lkg_required_connectors.purpose: Open and inspect public webpages, company investor pages, ABS releases, ASX announcements, and competitor pages.

x_lkg_required_connectors.name: file_read
x_lkg_required_connectors.purpose: Read saved source logs, fallback demo outputs, assumptions, and local research files.

x_lkg_required_connectors.name: microsoft_word
x_lkg_required_connectors.purpose: Produce the weekly digest as a Word-style review document.

x_lkg_required_connectors.name: microsoft_excel
x_lkg_required_connectors.purpose: Produce or update a source log and structured market signal tracker.

x_lkg_required_connectors.name: microsoft_ppt
x_lkg_required_connectors.purpose: Produce a board-summary outline or presentation-ready summary after human approval.

x_production_connector_candidates: Microsoft 365 Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and SharePoint connectors
Internal portfolio CRM or knowledge-base connector, if approved
